home.page_description: Choose between Harsha Karteek's Game Development and Web Development portfolio pages.
home.title: I keep my game work and web work separate so each one has its own space.
home.intro: I'm building two focused portfolio pages. One is for my game development work in Unity and Unreal. The other is for my web development journey and full-stack growth.
home.game_card_title: I build gameplay systems, atmosphere, prototypes, and playable releases.
home.game_card_body: Explore my Unity projects, engines, tools, published builds, and the way I approach interaction and level feel.
home.web_card_title: I'm growing into full-stack development through responsive interfaces and structured builds.
home.web_card_body: Explore my web projects, frontend work, learning track, and the systems I'm building toward.

web.page_description: Web development portfolio of Harsha Karteek with frontend work, full-stack learning, and responsive UI projects.
web.hero_image_alt: Portrait of Harsha Karteek on the web development page
web.title: Building clean, structured web experiences while expanding toward full-stack development.
web.intro: Alongside my work in game development, I actively build web projects to strengthen my understanding of frontend systems, layout architecture, and full-stack workflows.
web.identity: My focus is on creating interfaces that are readable, responsive, and logically structured. I approach web development with the same mindset I apply to gameplay systems: clarity, usability, and clean architecture.
web.about_body: My web projects focus on building well-structured interfaces using modern HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. I am currently expanding into backend development with Node.js and Express to better understand complete product architecture.
web.goal: My goal is to grow into a strong full-stack developer capable of building polished user interfaces and reliable backend systems that support real products.
web.feature_body: This portfolio is structured using external JSON content and modular page components, allowing projects, skills, and sections to be updated without modifying page markup.
web.feature_image_alt: Featured web project artwork for the developer portfolio platform
web.footer_text: I'm building my web portfolio around clarity, responsiveness, and steady full-stack growth.

projects.title: Developer Portfolio Platform
projects.summary: A modular developer portfolio designed with structured content management using JSON to separate presentation from data.

projects.title: Responsive Interface Experiments
projects.summary: A collection of responsive layout exercises focused on improving UI structure, spacing systems, and adaptive design patterns.

projects.title: Full-Stack Learning Track
projects.summary: An ongoing development track exploring backend architecture, API-driven applications, and server-side development using Node.js and Express.

game.page_description: Game development portfolio of Harsha Karteek with Unity projects, gameplay systems, atmosphere, and published builds.
game.hero_image_alt: Portrait of Harsha Karteek on the game development page
game.title: Unity Gameplay Programmer specializing in interactive systems, XR experiences, and playable mechanics.
game.intro: I focus on building gameplay systems, player interactions, and immersive experiences using Unity and C#. My work includes XR development, gameplay programming, and interactive prototypes across both solo and collaborative projects.
game.identity: My development style centers on responsive player controls, structured gameplay systems, and environments designed to support player interaction and pacing.
game.about_title: Gameplay systems, XR interaction, and playable prototypes.
game.about_body: With professional experience developing VR applications and interactive simulations, I specialize in building gameplay mechanics, interaction systems, and optimized environments for immersive platforms such as Meta Quest.
game.goal: My goal is to continue growing as a gameplay programmer by building stronger mechanics, scalable systems, and polished interactive experiences across games and XR platforms.
game.feature_name: The Happy Place: Smile of Deception
game.feature_body: A psychological horror experience focused on tension, environmental storytelling, and escape-driven gameplay built in Unity.
game.feature_image_alt: Featured game project artwork for The Happy Place: Smile of Deception
game.footer_text: I'm building games around atmosphere, interaction, and playable ideas that feel intentional.

projects.title: The Happy Place: Smile of Deception
projects.summary: A psychological horror experience built in Unity featuring exploration mechanics, environmental tension, and escape-based gameplay progression.

projects.title: Knockout Party
projects.summary: A multiplayer obstacle-race prototype focused on fast-paced party gameplay with dynamic traps and player interactions.

projects.title: Save The Eggs
projects.summary: A 2D arcade survival game centered on reaction timing, increasing difficulty, and score-based progression.

projects.title: Hunt
projects.summary: A level design prototype built in Unreal Engine exploring environmental layout, pacing, and player navigation within a playable space.
